raw_consumer_statement: I opened an account with American Express in XXXX, my wallet and card were stolen, and many police reports were generated. I immediately closed the card, however they are refusing after 7 years of disputing this, to remove it from my credit report. Stating that still there are XXXX XXXX  in charges. I never had the opportunity to use this card and 7 years ago reported all this as fraud, i do not have the card and all reports were filed with them and XXXX.
